children.heading: .—Stock and Dividends
children.label: a .—Stock and Dividends
children.text: The FFA may not issue stock or declare or pay a dividend.

children.heading: .—Political Activities
children.label: b .—Political Activities
children.text: The FFA or a director, officer, or member acting on behalf of the FFA may not contribute to, support, or assist a political party or candidate for elective public office.

children.heading: .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.label: c .—Distribution of Income or Assets
children.text: The income or assets of the FFA may not inure to the benefit of, or be distributed to, a director, officer, or member, except on dissolution or final liquidation of the FFA.

children.heading: .—Loans
children.label: d .—Loans
children.text: The FFA may not make a loan to a director, officer, or employee. Directors who vote for or assent to making a loan to a director, officer, or employee, and officers who participate in making the loan, are jointly and severally liable to the corporation for the amount of the loan until it is repaid.

children.heading: .—Prizes, Awards, Grants, or Loans to Student Officers and Members Meeting Criteria
children.label: e .—Prizes, Awards, Grants, or Loans to Student Officers and Members Meeting Criteria
children.text: This section does not preclude prizes, awards, grants, or loans to student officers and members meeting the criteria established by the board of directors for selecting recipients of those benefits.
